parameters.content:
## 35 — Financial Reconciliation Engine

**Env variables needed:**
- STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: Stripe secret key
- XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN: Xero OAuth2 access token
- FINANCE_TEAM_EMAIL: finance team distribution list

**Xero OAuth2:** Xero uses short-lived tokens. Set up an n8n Xero OAuth2 credential and use the built-in Xero node instead of HTTP Request for production (handles token refresh automatically).

**Amount in Stripe:** All Stripe amounts are in smallest currency unit (pence/cents) — the Code node divides by 100 to get pounds/dollars.
